title: boronia wilsonii
intro: Boronia wilsonii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the Wilson's boronia. The plant's flowers and leaves have been used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Boronia wilsonii include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and soothe skin irritations. Boronia wilsonii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and infused oils to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
